questions.q: What federal effort was recently struck down by a judge, aiming to protect critical habitats for endangered species?
options: Effort to weaken the Clean Water Act
Effort to weaken the Endangered Species Act
questions.correctText: A federal judge recently struck down efforts to weaken the Endangered Species Act.

questions.q: What is the name of the new oral GLP-1 obesity pill by Eli Lilly that received FDA approval on April 1, 2026?
questions.correctText: Eli Lilly's new oral GLP-1 obesity pill is named Foundayo.

questions.q: What significant space event did NASA recently launch for the first time in half a century?
questions.correctText: NASA recently launched its first crewed lunar mission in half a century.

questions.q: What major international organization is Donald Trump reportedly strongly considering pulling the US out of?
questions.correctText: Donald Trump is reportedly strongly considering pulling the US out of NATO.

questions.q: According to a recent report, why did Iran state it will not reopen the Strait of Hormuz?
questions.correctText: Iran stated it will not reopen the Strait of Hormuz because of Trump's 'ridiculous displays'.

questions.q: A years-long project published in Nature revealed that approximately what percentage of social-science studies fail a replication test?
questions.correctText: Around half, or 49 percent, of previously published research results in the social and behavioral sciences could not be replicated in new experiments.

questions.q: What type of exercise has been found to actively slow down the biological aging process in the brains of older adults?
questions.correctText: Regular resistance training in older adults can actively slow down the biological aging process in their brains.

questions.q: What message did the Iranian president convey in a recent letter regarding ordinary Americans?
options: Iran harbors no enmity towards them
Iran is open to cultural exchanges
questions.correctText: The Iranian president conveyed in a letter that Iran harbors no enmity towards ordinary Americans.

questions.q: According to a report on April 1, 2026, why did Valve's Gabe Newell reportedly 'step back' from direct involvement in game development after Portal 2?
options: He wanted to focus on Steam Deck
He felt his ideas were stifling the team as everyone agreed with him
questions.correctText: Gabe Newell stepped back because he felt his ideas were stifling the team, as everyone kept agreeing with him.

questions.q: On April 1, 2026, the US Patent and Trademark Office revoked a patent belonging to which major video game company, related to summoning characters to battle?
questions.correctText: The US Patent and Trademark Office revoked Nintendo's patent on summoning characters to battle.
